Dars Aquino﻿

Thank you Grace Gladiators Pickleball Club! Met my darlings here thank you for supporting your pickleball court-hopping girlie. Nice to meet you all! 


Back to work tomorrow… 


#pickleball #pickleballcourthopping #pickleballLife #pickleballLove #darsmypickleball
— kasama sina Sherie Mae Justoba Do at Jackie Gonzales sa Cebu City.
